caption: Get ready to groove and sip, Islamabad! 🎶✨ Welcome to the #MoyeMoyeTeaDanceChallenge at Keetli, where chai meets dance floor! Watch as our talented staff shakes to the beats, Kashmiri chai in hand, creating the perfect blend of fun and flavor. 💃☕ Now it’s your turn! Kya aap tayyar hain apna dance move dikhane ke liye? Join the challenge, show off your dance skills, and let’s make this trend viral together! 🕺🎉 #ChaiAurDance #KeetliVibes
cta: Join the challenge, tag us in your reel, and let's dance the chai way!

caption: Introducing the #KeetliWow moments, where every sip is an experience! 🌟 Imagine walking into Keetli, the aroma of freshly brewed Kashmiri tea wafting through the air, and the vibrant colors of the chai setup inviting you to capture the perfect Insta moment. 📸✨ This stunning shot by one of our chai lovers is truly 'Looking Like a Wow'! Unchi chai ki baat hi kuch aur hai! 😍🍵 Have you captured your Keetli Wow moment yet? Share it with us! 🌈❤️
cta: Snap your #KeetliWow moment and tag us to get featured!

caption: Ever wondered what happens behind the scenes at Keetli? 🍵🎉 Our team is not just about brewing the perfect chai but also about creating the perfect vibe!
